content_body: This was our first staff trip with spouses and it met all of our expectations, plus some. The fireplace was our favorite place of laughter, conversation and bonding. The spouses thoroughly enjoyed the sunrises & sunsets from each balcony and/or the top of the driveway. The hot tub was great all day. Thank you for making each room inviting and conversation ready. This was a great place to relax and getaway. We pray that your home is continually blessed, that you are encouraged daily knowing your home is enjoyed, and that you are given greater days ahead of you.
title: Fabulous Corporate Getaway in the North Georgia Mountains
